content:
Today I started preparing for my WiseDo founder screening interview with Anshul Rathore.

I'm revising FastAPI, Next.js, React Flow, Cognee, Google Gemini, and knowledge graphs.

My project Memzee can import GitHub repositories and YouTube videos, build an AI-powered knowledge graph, and support natural language recall.

My goal is to finish the hackathon submission today, deploy it on Vercel and Render, and record the final demo video.
